Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker TNGX dominates today's rankings at position #1 with an exceptional composite score of 97.4, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,110% over one year while maintaining all four major moving average supports (SMA 30/50/100/200). The stock shows explosive momentum with a 1-month return of 63.47% and a 3-month return of 144.26%, though the ratio consistency reveals some acceleration unevenness (ratio_1m_1w of 4.99 stands out as anomalously high). Despite these extreme gains, TNGX displays remarkable resilience on down-market days with a bad_spy_score of only 0.38, and shows weak correlations across most sectors, suggesting idiosyncratic strength rather than broad market participation. PL (Palladium) ranks #2 with a 798% one-year return and 198% six-month return, but exhibits meaningful differences from TNGX: it has only 3 ratio passes versus TNGX's 4, and critically, a bad_spy_score of 2.81—over seven times higher—indicating notably higher downside correlation during market stress.
